title: Octagon House, Watertown, Wisconsin - floor plans (HABS)
creator: Historic American Buildings Survey (HABS WIS-28)
rightsholder_or_source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division (HABS); via Wikimedia Commons
research_notes: HABS measured-drawing sheet (US Government work, public domain). Lane A may also cover US HABS; included here for octagon-geometry coverage.
research_features: Octagonal (eight-sided) house: trapezoidal/wedge-shaped rooms radiating around a central core and stair. Multiple floor plans on one measured-drawing sheet. Core test for non-rectangular octagon geometry.
feature_highlights: a true eight-sided octagon envelope of eight straight exterior walls
rooms ringing a central stair hall in a radial, eight-sided organization
four corner rooms are five-sided shapes with one wall cut at 45 degrees on the diagonal faces
central hall and service spaces become wedge and trapezoidal shapes around the stair
Butlery served by a labeled dumb waiter (a small vertical lift)
Veranda wrapping the lower faces as a roofed-but-open porch
two plans on one sheet (first floor + ground/lower floor) with matching octagon geometry
compass rose north indicator plus dual imperial and metric (proportional) scale bars
supported_examples: straight exterior walls at 45-degree and right angles forming the octagon
custom-polygon room override for the pentagonal corner rooms and wedge/trapezoidal core spaces
rooms with names (Dining Room, Living Room, Parlor, Music Room, Bed Room, Kitchen, Pantry, Cellar)
linear point-to-point dimensions in imperial units
roadmap_examples: floor management for the two stacked floors (first floor over ground/cellar level)
straight-run or winding stairs in the central hall
era registry/tagging for the Fowler octagon-movement style

gap_features.why: the Butlery is served by a labeled dumb waiter, a small vertical lift that is neither a stair nor any roadmap circulation element
the Veranda wraps the lower faces of the octagon as a roofed-but-open porch that must be drawable as a space without being a fully wall-enclosed room
the survey sheet carries a compass-rose north indicator and dual imperial/metric graphic scale bars as plan annotations
